Home Baseball

Baseball Lockers

THE LOCKER ROOM

OUR LOCKERS

Premium Wood Locker Collection
6 Models Available | Quick Ship & Custom Options | 2-12 Week Delivery | Lifetime Warranty | Free Consultation

Choose from 6 premium wood locker models designed specifically for athletic teams. Our collection ranges from the essential Semi Pro and Varsity models perfect for high school teams, to our elite Pro, Stadium, Elite, and Legendary models built for collegiate and professional facilities. Every locker features premium 6-layer melamine-faced plywood construction with superior moisture resistance and fire-rated materials. Quick ship models (Stadium & Elite) deliver in 2-4 weeks, while fully custom lockers ship in 8-12 weeks with your choice of dimensions, finishes, colors, and hardware. All backed by our lifetime warranty on wood construction and 5-year materials guarantee.

Semi Pro

$349.00

View Details

Varsity

$449.00

View Details

Pro

$549.00

View Details

Stadium

$599.00

View Details

Elite

$599.00

View Details

Legendary

$599.00

View Details

THE LOCKER ROOM

READY TO UPGRADE YOUR BASEBALL LOCKER ROOM?

Custom Baseball Storage Solutions
Bats | Gloves | Helmets | Cleats | Catcher's Gear | Batting Gloves | Uniforms | Protective Equipment | Dugout Storage

Custom baseball locker room solutions designed for professional and collegiate teams. Our wood athletic lockers provide organized storage for all your baseball equipment including bats, gloves, helmets, cleats, catcher's gear, batting gloves, uniforms, and protective equipment. With 30+ years of experience building team locker rooms across the United States, we specialize in custom baseball storage systems that keep your dugout equipment, training gear, and game day essentials organized and accessible. From high school baseball teams to professional MLB facilities, our baseball lockers are built to handle everything from Louisville Sluggers to Wilson gloves, Rawlings catcher's mitts to Nike cleats. Expert baseball locker room design, installation, and customization. Free consultation, lifetime warranty on wood construction, 5-year warranty on all materials. Serving teams nationwide with custom wood lockers, team storage solutions, and complete locker room renovations.

Get Baseball Locker Quote
BASEBALL

Powerful Sports Theme

Diamond Champions

"It ain't over till it's over."

— Yogi Berra

"Baseball is 90% mental and the other half is physical."

— Yogi Berra

"You can observe a lot by watching."

— Yogi Berra

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 30+ years of craftsmanship.
